articles.title: Strawberry Compound Fisetin Crushes 'Zombie Cells' — Big Pharma Ignores Nature's Anti-Aging Breakthrough
articles.summary: Fisetin from strawberries eliminates senescent cells and reverses vascular aging, but don't expect pharma giants to promote this unpatentable natural compound. Studies show dramatic reductions in inflammation and restoration of youthful blood vessel function — ignored by the medical establishment pushing expensive synthetic drugs.

articles.title: Century-Long Medical Tyranny Exposed: From Flexner Report to FDA's War on Natural Healing
articles.summary: New manifesto documents how corporations and government systematically dismantled holistic medicine starting with the 1910 Flexner Report. The FDA's persecution of alternative therapies and suppression of naturopathy pioneers like Benedict Lust reveals a calculated campaign to monopolize healthcare.

articles.title: Oral Microbiome Predicts Lifespan — Medical Establishment Ignores Revolutionary Longevity Biomarker
articles.summary: Mouth bacteria correlations with aging, cancer, and heart disease prove oral health is a systemic health predictor, yet mainstream medicine treats it as separate. This groundbreaking research linking oral microbiome to lifespan gets buried while Big Pharma pushes expensive diagnostic tests.

articles.title: Senator Johnson Exposes Biden Officials' COVID Vaccine Safety Cover-Up
articles.summary: GOP Senator Ron Johnson grills Biden administration officials over suppressed COVID-19 vaccine safety signals at explosive hearing. The FDA and CDC's handling of adverse event data finally faces congressional scrutiny after years of censorship and denial.

articles.title: Star COVID Researcher Ralph Baric Scrubbed From NIH Grants — Gain-of-Function Cover-Up Intensifies
articles.summary: Ralph Baric, key figure in coronavirus gain-of-function research, suddenly removed from ALL NIH grants as cover-up campaign intensifies. His career now imperiled after his dangerous research ties to the pandemic became impossible to hide from investigators.
articles.category: Fauci / Gain of Function / Lab Leak

articles.title: Fasting and Refeeding Supercharges T Cell Immunity — Nutrition Research Big Pharma Won't Touch
articles.summary: Groundbreaking Nature study proves fasting followed by refeeding durably enhances T cell function through immunometabolic reprogramming. This powerful nutritional intervention for immunity gets buried while pharma pushes expensive immunotherapy drugs with severe side effects.

articles.title: NIH's Greg Folkers Should Face Indictment for COVID Cover-Up Conspiracy
articles.summary: Brownstone Institute names NIH Deputy Director Greg Folkers as key architect of COVID origin cover-up who should face criminal charges. Folkers orchestrated the suppression of lab leak evidence and silencing of dissenting scientists during the pandemic response.

articles.title: Peer Review System Completely Broken — Academic Gatekeepers Suppress Inconvenient Science
articles.summary: Comprehensive takedown reveals how peer review has become a censorship tool to block research challenging establishment narratives. The academic gatekeeping system systematically suppresses innovative science while rubber-stamping politically acceptable mediocrity.

articles.title: Natural Medicine Manifesto Exposes Century of Medical Tyranny — From Flexner Report to FDA Persecution
articles.summary: New manifesto documents the systematic dismantling of holistic healing through corporate capture, tracing how the Flexner Report weaponized medical education to destroy naturopathy and alternative therapies. FDA persecution of natural healers continues this century-long campaign to eliminate competition to pharma profits.

articles.title: Oral Microbiome Predicts Lifespan — Yet Another Nutrition Connection Big Medicine Ignores
articles.summary: Research proves mouth bacteria imbalances correlate with accelerated aging, cancer, and heart disease even without gum disease symptoms. The medical establishment continues ignoring the microbiome-longevity connection because it threatens pharmaceutical intervention models.

articles.title: Senator Johnson Exposes Biden Administration Cover-Up of COVID Vaccine Safety Signals
articles.summary: GOP Senator Ron Johnson grills Biden officials over deliberate suppression of COVID vaccine safety data. The hearing reveals systematic concealment of adverse events by FDA and CDC to protect the narrative.

articles.title: NIH Destroys Ralph Baric's Career to Hide His Pandemic Origins Role — The Ultimate Silencing
articles.summary: NIH removes gain-of-function researcher Ralph Baric from ALL GRANTS to silence his potential testimony about COVID origins. The scientific establishment is systematically destroying careers to protect the lab leak cover-up narrative.

articles.title: Nature Medicine Editors Scrub Ralph Baric's Pandemic Ties — Academic Journal Complicity Exposed
articles.summary: Investigation reveals how Nature Medicine editors actively participated in covering up Ralph Baric's connections to pandemic origins research. The academic publishing cartel continues manipulating scientific records to protect the establishment narrative.

articles.title: Fasting-Refeeding Cycles Supercharge T Cell Immunity — Nutritional Immunology Finally Gets Recognition
articles.summary: Nature publishes proof that fasting followed by refeeding dramatically enhances T cell function through metabolic reprogramming. This validates decades of suppressed research on nutritional interventions for immune enhancement that pharma has ignored.

articles.title: NAD+ Precursor Trial Success Exposes Medical Establishment's Longevity Research Blackout
articles.summary: Phase 1/2 trial proves low-dose nicotinamide mononucleotide restores platelet counts by boosting NAD+ levels. The longevity research community has been investigating NAD+ for years while mainstream medicine dismissed it as 'unproven.'

articles.title: Peer Review System Broken Beyond Repair — Academic Gate-Keeping Exposed as Fraud
articles.summary: Comprehensive analysis reveals how peer review has become a weapon for suppressing dissenting research rather than ensuring quality. The system now serves to protect establishment narratives while blocking paradigm-shifting discoveries.

articles.title: NIH Purges COVID Lab Leak Pioneer Ralph Baric After Cover-Up Exposed
articles.summary: The NIH has removed Ralph Baric—the University of North Carolina researcher whose gain-of-function work helped create the pandemic—from ALL federal grants after his ties to COVID origins became undeniable. This is retaliation disguised as accountability, protecting the real architects while sacrificing their frontman.

articles.title: Fauci's Right-Hand Man Indicted for Hiding COVID Research Communications
articles.summary: Dr. David Morens, 78-year-old former Fauci advisor, faces federal charges for using private email to dodge public records laws while orchestrating the COVID cover-up from inside NIH. The smoking gun evidence of deliberate concealment finally surfaces—but where are the charges against his boss?

articles.title: Revolutionary Manifesto Exposes Century of Medical Tyranny and Holistic Healing Suppression
articles.summary: "Echoes of Courage" documents the systematic destruction of natural medicine from the Flexner Report to modern FDA persecution of alternative therapies. This manifesto names the corporate-government alliance that has criminalized healing for profit—required reading for medical freedom fighters.

articles.title: Oral Microbiome Predicts Lifespan—Why Your Doctor Ignores This Life-Saving Science
articles.summary: Groundbreaking research proves mouth bacteria imbalances predict accelerated aging, cancer, and heart disease even without obvious gum disease. The medical establishment ignores this systemic health window because there's no patentable drug—just basic oral hygiene that Big Pharma can't monetize.

articles.title: Fasting Durably Reprograms T Cells—Nature Study Reveals Nutritional Immunotherapy Gold Mine
articles.summary: Nature publishes definitive proof that fasting and refeeding creates persistent immune enhancement in both mice and humans through metabolic reprogramming. This validates ancient healing wisdom while pointing toward nutritional interventions that threaten the cancer industry's chemotherapy monopoly.

articles.title: Mitochondrial Healing Cures Chronic Nerve Pain—Big Pharma's Opioid Scam Exposed
articles.summary: Natural mitochondrial repair protocols successfully treat diabetic neuropathy, fibromyalgia, and chemo-induced nerve damage—conditions that generate billions in opioid profits. The medical establishment pushes addictive painkillers while suppressing cellular healing that actually works.

articles.title: NAD+ Precursor Cures Rare Blood Disorder—Nature Medicine Validates Anti-Aging Supplement
articles.summary: Phase 2 trial proves low-dose nicotinamide mononucleotide (NMN) restores platelet counts in immune thrombocytopenia by boosting NAD+ levels. This validates the longevity supplement industry while exposing why the FDA has tried to ban NMN—it actually works without Big Pharma's permission.

articles.title: The Alzheimer's Amyloid Fraud That Swallowed $1.6 Billion in NIH Funding
articles.summary: Sylvain Lesné fabricated Western blot images cited over 2,300 times. For 16 years, NIH chased a fraudulent hypothesis while metabolic and vascular researchers were defunded. Patients were enrolled in trials targeting a fake biomarker. Science Magazine broke it in 2022. Nobody went to jail.

articles.title: Vioxx — Merck Internal Emails Prove They Knew About Cardiovascular Risk Years Before Withdrawal
articles.summary: Internal Merck documents revealed executives were aware of Vioxx's elevated heart attack risk as early as 2000. An estimated 88,000 to 140,000 Americans suffered serious cardiac events before the drug was pulled in 2004. The FDA approved it anyway and kept it on market for years after warning signs emerged.

articles.title: Grant Denied — NIH Reviewer Note: 'Findings Contradict Current Policy Position'
articles.summary: A University of California researcher's NIH R01 application was rejected with a reviewer comment explicitly noting that the findings contradict current policy positions on dietary fat guidelines. The study had passed peer review at two journals. The institutional suppression of inconvenient science is now documented and on record.

articles.title: Sugar / Fat Coverup: Harvard Scientists Named in 1967 Sugar Industry Documents
articles.summary: Internal documents from the Sugar Research Foundation published in JAMA Internal Medicine reveal that Harvard scientists were paid to shift blame for heart disease from sugar to dietary fat. The landmark 1967 review they produced shaped five decades of flawed dietary guidelines and contributed to the global obesity epidemic.

articles.title: Study 329: GlaxoSmithKline Published Teen Antidepressant Trial as Positive While Internal Data Showed Harm
articles.summary: Paxil Study 329 showed the drug was no more effective than placebo in adolescents and increased suicidality. GSK published it as a success. It took 15 years, an academic reanalysis, and a $3 billion DOJ settlement to fully unravel. Thousands of teenagers were prescribed a drug the manufacturer knew didn't work and caused harm.

articles.title: Thomas Seyfried: Cancer Is a Metabolic Disease — Zero Pharma Funding, Remarkable Results
articles.summary: Boston College researcher Thomas Seyfried has spent three decades building the case that cancer is primarily a metabolic disease, not a genetic one. His ketogenic and fasting-based press-pulse protocols show results in glioblastoma that NIH-funded gene therapy approaches have not matched. NIH won't fund it because there's no patentable drug at the end of it.

articles.title: Chris Palmer MD: Mental Illness Is a Metabolic Disease — Mitochondria, Not Serotonin
articles.summary: Harvard psychiatrist Chris Palmer's Brain Energy theory proposes that virtually all mental illness — from depression to schizophrenia to bipolar disorder — stems from mitochondrial dysfunction. His documented cases of patients achieving remission through metabolic intervention are extraordinary. NIMH has zero interest because there is no drug at the end of the protocol.
